name: scalervoices
description: Persona-based AI chatbot — converse with Anshuman Singh, Abhimanyu Saxena, and Kshitij Mishra.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.build: npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server install --omit=dev
